name: Workable
description: Monitor Workable account member access and role assignments for compliance

credentialFields.label: API Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate in Workable: Settings > Integrations > API Access Tokens. Must have r_jobs scope.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Workable account members with their roles to verify appropriate access levels

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies role assignments for all Workable account members to ensure proper access controls
